text.title: Jira Workflow Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observables (atlassian_tier, team_size, workflow_complexity) to apply / fall-back / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Org is on Atlassian stack with admin access?

conclusion.verdict: apply full Jira workflow management with YAML + automation throttling
lightweight Jira setup with default workflows; revisit at scale
no admin access — pick GitLab/ADO/Linear instead

text.example: atlassian_admin_access=true → team_size=25 → apply full workflow management (rule workflow-as-yaml-versioned).
